resource.name: Ping
resource.description: to check if the system is available, no authorization required

resource.name: BackendUrl
resource.description: Get/add/delete the current backend base url, for list, no authorization required

resource.name: RestRequest
resource.description: Get a REST request of a owner, or user

resource.name: Application
resource.description: Get/add/delete the application overrides for base url, for list, no authorization required

resource.name: SystemSettings
resource.description: Get/update system settings (Gemini API key, email server) for the current tenant
